title: × elyhordeum chatangense
side_effects: × elyhordeum chatangense can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and hives, as well as respiratory issues like wheezing and shortness of breath. Ingesting excessive amounts can lead to stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea, and may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications. Some individuals may experience dizziness, headaches, or fatigue due to the plant's potential impact on blood pressure and cardiovascular function. Improper use of × elyhordeum chatangense may also exacerbate pre-existing conditions, such as kidney or liver disease.
